title: Animals
explanation:
Animals

  • pets: dog, cat, fish, rabbit, hamster
  • farm animals: cow, horse, sheep, chicken, pig
  • wild animals: lion, elephant, tiger, bear, monkey
  • verbs: bark, fly, swim, run

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: My ____ sleeps on my bed. | *cat | horse | elephant
A ____ is the king of the jungle. | *lion | fish | rabbit

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: We have a small ____ in a cage. | rabbit
The ____ has a very long nose. | elephant

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Dogs ____ when someone comes to the door. | *bark | fly | swim
A ____ gives us eggs. | *chicken | lion | bear
The ____ has orange and black stripes. | *tiger | cow | hamster
We saw a ____ at the zoo. | *monkey | pig | sheep
